name: gpu-bridge-dev
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker.io curl ca-certificates && sudo curl -L https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/download/v2.27.1/docker-compose-linux-aarch64 -o /usr/local/bin/docker-compose && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/docker-compose && echo 'vscode ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/docker, /usr/local/bin/docker-compose' | sudo tee /etc/sudoers.d/99-docker-nopasswd >/dev/null && sudo chmod 0440 /etc/sudoers.d/99-docker-nopasswd && pip install -U pip && pip install -r requirements-dev.txt -r controller/requirements.txt && pip install -e ./cli -e ./worker
